name: Pampa Municipal
description_short: Pampa Municipal Credit Union is a federally-regulated credit union offering savings, money market, and certificate accounts to members in Pampa, Texas.
description_long:
Pampa Municipal Credit Union is a credit union headquartered in Pampa, Texas, serving the local community with deposit and lending services. As a member-owned financial cooperative, it operates under federal NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) regulation and oversight, distinguishing it from traditional banks.

The institution offers a range of deposit products including savings accounts, money market accounts, and share certificates (CDs) at various term lengths. According to MonitorBankRates' April 2026 data, they provide 12-month share certificates, 6-month certificates, 3-month certificates, savings accounts, and money market accounts. The credit union also offers mortgage products, with 30-year fixed mortgage rates tracked at approximately 5.79% as of the review date.

Pampa Municipal Credit Union distinguishes itself through exceptional financial health metrics. It holds a 5.0 Star Rating (Exceptional) from MonitorBankRates, an A Overall Health Grade (Excellent, 95/100), and a Texas Ratio of 9.26%—higher than the national average of 6.13%, indicating very low non-performing assets relative to capital reserves. These metrics reflect a strong balance sheet and financial stability.

The primary limitation is that specific current rates were not available at the time of the MonitorBankRates review dated April 6, 2026. Additionally, membership may be restricted to those within Pampa, Texas, or specific employer/community affiliations, though this is not explicitly detailed on the reviewed page. The institution's small size likely means fewer technology features compared to larger national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

best_for: Pampa, Texas residents seeking stable, well-capitalized local credit union membership

diagnosis: Pampa Municipal Credit Union is best for Pampa, Texas residents who prioritize financial safety, stability, and member-owned governance over rate competitiveness or technological convenience. The main caveat is that specific current rates were unavailable at review time, and membership access is likely geographically or affiliation-restricted to the local Pampa area.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
